subject: Re: Not-a-Number value error in WarpTools
body:
Hi Shintaro, 
Good to see you here! Would you mind opening a GitHub issue with a link to download the problematic gain and a movie?
I’ll take a look but it won’t be for at least a couple of weeks as I’m just about to start vacation - maybe Dimitry will take a look before 🙂
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Aug 8, 2024, at 11:23, Shintaro Aibara <shintaro.aibara@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
Hi Community!
A bit of an odd one, but perhaps I could be pointed in the right direction....
I encountered an error where WarpTools crashes on the first step, specifically with a particular gain reference. This gain reference was collected as a .gain format, converted to a mrc file with tif2mrc.
Presumably something is wrong with this particular file as I get a System.ArtithmeticException error with this file. Changing with a gain from another day doesn't raise this error.
This is an issue specifically with WarpTools as Warp 1.1-beta can handle this file fine. Looking as the image with --stats on relion image handler doest raise any flags with me.
Best wishes
Shintaro
